backend/main.mo: Main Internet Computer actor implementing user profiles, product catalog (CRUD), and reviews with role-based access control (admin/user) via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that product image displays in PhotoGallery.tsx and ProductCard.tsx were updated to a square 1:1 aspect ratio with object-fit cover.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON mapping of frontend file paths to short summaries describing each component's purpose and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines light and dark CSS custom property tokens for the design system.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and composes Header, HeroBanner, AboutSection, AdminPage, ProductsPage, Footer, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Static section displaying three feature cards (Authentic Merch, Nationwide Delivery, Cash on Delivery) with neon-blue accents to highlight store benefits.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Internet Identity login/logout button that shows the user's shortened principal when authenticated and a loading spinner during the login flow.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with Instagram and email contact links, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/GenderThemeAnima: One-shot entrance animation that spawns 18 falling sakura/sparkle emoji petals when the female gender theme becomes active, then fades out after ~4.5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top header displaying the Anime_Vibe_PK logo on the left and an Instagram link button with neon-blue styling on the right.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Renders a full-width hero banner section with a background image, gradient overlay, animated 'Anime Merch Pakistan' heading, and a pulsing 'Pre-Orders Open' badge.
frontend/src/components/PhotoGallery.tsx: Displays a product photo gallery with a primary square image, a scrollable thumbnail strip, and a lightbox trigger; falls back to a placeholder image if no valid photos exist.
frontend/src/components/PhotoLightbox.ts: A fullscreen image lightbox supporting keyboard navigation, scroll-wheel zoom, mouse drag panning, and touch pinch-to-zoom for browsing a photo array.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a clickable product card with image, category badge, price, and optional size/color pill selectors; supports 'default' and 'female' visual themes.
frontend/src/components/ProductDetailMod: A modal overlay showing full product details including a photo gallery, badges, price, sizes/colors, description, and an Instagram order button, with theme support for default and female styles.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Displays product reviews with an average star rating and a submission form for name, star rating, and comment; uses React Query hooks to fetch and post reviews.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products and reviews, wrapping backend actor calls for creating, fetching, deleting products, and adding/fetching reviews.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, defines CSS custom properties for a dark theme with neon blue and waifu pink color schemes, and enforces minimum touch target sizes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page protected by both Internet Identity authentication and a hardcoded password, allowing admins to create products (with photos, sizes, colors, gender) and delete individual or all products.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Products listing page with category and gender filters, displaying products in a grid with skeleton loading states, product detail modal, and a female-theme animation triggered on gender tab switch.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers for persisting values to/from sessionStorage and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (neon blue, waifu pink/purple, sidebar, chart colors), custom fonts, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 27) describing an anime merchandise store for Anime_Vibe_PK with a JJK-themed dark UI, tracking architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features such as homepage, product grid, admin panel, and Instagram-based pre-order flow.
